elements.title: 1972 Worcester Art Museum robbery
elements.contents: ... that the four paintings stolen in the 1972 Worcester Art Museum robbery (one pictured) were discovered hidden on a pig farm?

elements.title: Healing Heart totem pole
elements.contents: ... that many of the people who carved the Healing Heart totem pole had no previous carving experience?

elements.title: Battle of Mucellium
elements.contents: ... that the death of a general's bodyguard led to a decisive Byzantine defeat at the Battle of Mucellium even though they outnumbered the Ostrogoths?

elements.title: the queen mother of the last king of Awadh
elements.contents: ... that the queen mother of the last king of Awadh is buried near Marcel Proust?

elements.title: Drop Dead
elements.contents: ... that Olivia Rodrigo teased her song "Drop Dead" by placing pink padlocks in cities including London, Paris, Los Angeles, and Hoboken?

elements.title: Arturo Gramajo
elements.contents: ... that Olympic bobsledder Arturo Gramajo is attributed with the invention of a popular Argentine hash dish?

elements.title: Olive
elements.contents: ... that the fashion trends of French high school girls inspired the "Olive Girl" style in Japan?

elements.title: Sylvain Bromberger
elements.contents: ... that Sylvain Bromberger described a state in which all actual answers to a question are known to be false, even though the question has a correct answer?

elements.title: beneath the streets of Wellington
elements.contents: ... that "no one told the eels to stop acting like eels" beneath the streets of Wellington?
